item.title: About Us
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Welcome to WoodMart, your premier destination for high-quality mechanical keyboards, switches, and keycaps. Whether you are a gamer, a programmer, or a typing aficionado, WoodMart offers a wide range of options to elevate your setup.

Comfort in every click! 🙌 Comfort in every click! 🙌 Comfort in every click! 🙌 Comfort in every click! 🙌 Comfort in every click! 🙌 Comfort in every click! 🙌 Comfort in every click! 🙌 Comfort in every click! 🙌

Components from trusted manufacturers

Our selection of mechanical keyboards, switches, and keycaps comes from leading brands, ensuring you receive only for the best.

Explore

Personalized advice and support

Our team is passionate about the products we offer and is always ready to assist you with tailored recommendations and guidance.

Contact us

The ultimate typing experience

Whether you're a gamer, programmer, or typing enthusiast, our premium products offer unmatched comfort, precision, and durability.

To reviews

Frequently asked questions

What are the benefits of using a mechanical keyboard over a membrane keyboard?

A seemingly elegant design can quickly begin to bloat with unexpected content or break under the weight of actual activity. Fake data can ensure a nice looking layout but it doesn’t reflect what a living, breathing application must endure. Real data does.

How do I choose the right switch for my mechanical keyboard?

Websites in professional use templating systems. Commercial publishing platforms and content management systems ensure that you can show different text, different data using the same template. When it’s about controlling hundreds of articles, product pages for web shops.

Can I customize my mechanical keyboard?

If the contents of the parcel are suspicious to customs officers (for example, many identical goods), it may be further checked. Keep the product in its original packaging along with all documents confirming the purchase and refund. You will need this for further communication with the seller and the payment system.

What is the difference between RGB and non-RGB mechanical keyboards?

Check the email you received after placing your order. It should contain information about the status of your order and the expected delivery date. Keep the product in its original packaging along with all documents confirming the purchase and refund. You will need this for further communication with the seller and the payment system.

How do I clean and maintain my mechanical keyboard?

Websites in professional use templating systems. Commercial publishing platforms and content management systems ensure that you can show different text, different data using the same template. When it’s about controlling hundreds of articles, product pages for web shops.

item.title: Contact Us
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Get in touch

Contact us for any questions related to your order, personalized advice and support

item.title: Single product layout Keyboards
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Home
Glorious Coiled Keyboard Cable $65.00 Back to products Wuque Studio Keyno Y8 $210.00 Brand: Osume

Osume sakura

  • 67% layout, fully aluminum gasket-mounted case
  • Hot-swappable connectors and stabilizers included
  • Proprietary materials produce a deep sound

$25.00

Add to wishlist Estimated delivery: May 31, 2026 – June 2, 2026

Don't Miss Top Accessories

Wuque Studio Keyno Y8

$210.00 Add to cart

NuPhy Twotone Wrist Rest

$34.00 Add to cart

Kailh Box Jade Thick Clicky Switches

$6.30 Add to cart

Melgeek Pixel 16bit

$29.99 Original price was: $29.99.$25.49Current price is: $25.49. Add to cart

AEBoards Staebies V2.1 Stabilizers

$22.00 Add to cart

Osume dalgona cable

$79.00 Add to cart

Haimu x Geon HG Red Silent Linear Switches

$5.76 Add to cart

Kalam Unikorn Purple PVD

$283.00 Add to cart

Gateron EF Grayish Tactile Switches

$4.59 Add to cart

Melgeek Label

$59.99 Add to cart

Wuque Titanium Switch Puller

$15.00 Add to cart

Akko Cinnamoroll Star 5108B Plus

$119.99 Add to cart Shipping Information

All orders will be shipped by NuPhy within 48 hours of order confirmation, tracking numbers are provided no later than a day after shipment on business days. You can check Shipping Policy for more information.

Warranty Policy

NuPhy offers a 1-year limited warranty for all NuPhy products. If there is any quality issue, please send relevant images or videos to service@nuphy.com for review.

Secure Payment

NuPhy offers a 1-year limited warranty for all NuPhy products. If there is any quality issue, please send relevant images or videos to service@nuphy.com for review.

  • Overview
  • Specs
  • Reviews

Reloaded. Rewired. Reinvented.

Sep 5th 2021 marks the date when the low-profile mechanical keyboard was forever changed by the release of NuPhy Air75. Fast forward 2 years, we are excited to share that a new Air75 with lightning fast connection and light weight, one not just built for you, but also put you in charge, is now ready.

New Arrivals

Bask in the fresh Air ‘Less is more’ has been our mantra when it comes to designing

Keycaps

A double-shot keycap at half the thickness Double-shot PBT keycaps are finally coming to Air75!

    Tech specs

    Specification

    Weight1.1 kg

    Materials

    Weight1.1 kg

    Reviews

    You may also like…

    Kailh Box Jade Thick Clicky Switches

    Switches $6.30 Add to cart Compare Quick view Add to wishlist

layout, fully aluminum gasket-mounted case","_id":"e3e7fd3"},{"list_content":"Hot-swappable connectors and stabilizers included","_id":"db98bdc"},{"list_content":"Proprietary materials produce a deep Accessories","orderby":"rand","layout":"carousel","slides_per_view":{"unit":"px","size":1,"sizes":[]},"carousel_arrows_position_popover":"yes","carousel_arrows_position":"together","hide_pagination_control":"yes","hide_scrollbar":"","hide_scrollbar_tablet":"","hide_scrollbar_mobile":"","sync_parent_id":"wd_69df7baecbb11","product_hover":"custom","product_custom_hover":"670","title_typography_typography":"custom","title_typography_font_size":{"unit":"px","size":16,"sizes":[]},"scroll_y":-80,"sync_group_id":"group-1"},"elements":[],"widgetType":"wd_products"}],"isInner":true},{"id":"5b8ef5f","elType":"container","settings":{"content_width":"full","background_background":"classic","background_color":"#FFFFFF","border_radius":{"unit":"px","top":"16","right":"16","bottom":"16","left":"16","isLinked":true},"padding":{"unit":"px","top":"30","right":"30","bottom":"30","left":"30","isLinked":true},"scroll_y":-80},"elements":[{"id":"4316171","elType":"widget","settings":{"items":[{"item_title":"Shipping Information","item_content":"

All orders will be shipped by NuPhy within 48 hours of order confirmation, tracking numbers are provided no later than a day after shipment on business days. You can check Shipping Policy for more information.<\/p>","_id":"7c51ae6"},{"item_title":"Warranty Policy","item_content":"

NuPhy offers a 1-year limited warranty for all NuPhy products. If there is any quality issue, please send relevant images or videos to service@nuphy.com for review.<\/p>","_id":"f5daa4b"},{"item_title":"Secure Payment","item_content":"

NuPhy offers a 1-year limited warranty for all NuPhy products. If there is any quality issue, please send relevant images or videos to service@nuphy.com for item.title: My account layout Keyboards
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
My account

Home
  • Dashboard
  • Orders
  • Downloads
  • Addresses
  • Account details
  • Wishlist
  • Logout

Hello Mr. Mackay (not Mr. Mackay? Log out)

From your account dashboard you can view your recent orders, manage your shipping and billing addresses, and edit your password and account details.

item.title: Prefooter Keyboards
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
item.content:encoded:
Join our community, discuss, share, and be the first to learn about new products and sales.

You need to configure your Mailchimp API key for this form to work properly.

Will be used in accordance with our Privacy Policy

item.title: Product loop item layout Keyboards
item.dc:creator: Mr. Mackay
